# UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextAlignment.natural

**Case**

The text uses the default alignment that the system associates with the current localization of the app.

## Declaration

```swift
case natural
```

## Text alignment

- **UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextAlignment.center**: The text has centered alignment.
- **UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextAlignment.justified**: The text has justified alignment.
title: UIListContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextAlignment.natural
